title: The Space Force is now seeking to buy up to $30 billion in rocket launches
summary: Rocket Lab, Stoke Space, and most recently, Relativity Space and Impulse Space were added to the roster of companies competing to launch Lane 1 missions. Now, the Space Force is tripling the maximum value for the Lane 1 contract.
caption: output/2026-07-20/the-space-force-is-now-seeking-to-buy-up-to-30-billion-in-rocket-launc.txt
